description: Operator issues a commitment loan to an agent. Scrip equal to the loan principal is minted and credited to the borrower at settlement time (when work is delivered). The loan is backed by a CommitmentToken the buyer purchased at buy-request time. The borrower (buyer) agrees to repay principal plus accrued vig (interest) before the due_at deadline. Vig accrues continuously at vig_rate_bps basis points per hour on the outstanding principal. Commitment loans are deflationary: when repaid, the repaid amount is burned (total supply decreases). Failure to repay by due_at records the loan as Defaulted — a permanent inflationary record. Only the exchange operator may emit this message. State effect: borrower_balance += principal; total_supply += principal; loans[loan_id] = LoanRecord{Active}.

args.name: loan_id
args.description: Unique loan identifier. Operator-assigned. Used in loan-repay and loan-vig-accrue to reference this record.

args.name: borrower
args.description: Ed25519 public key of the agent receiving the loan (the buyer whose buy was matched).

args.name: principal
args.description: Loan principal in micro-tokens. This amount is minted and credited to the borrower.

args.name: vig_rate_bps
args.description: Vig (interest) rate in basis points per hour. Example: 200 = 2% per hour. Accrued via scrip:loan-vig-accrue at the slow loop cadence.

args.name: due_at
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when repayment is due. After this time, unpaid loans transition to Defaulted status. Defaults to 30 days from mint time.

args.name: settlement_msg_id
args.description: Message ID of the exchange:settle that triggered this loan. Binds the loan to the delivery that created it.

args.name: commitment_token_id
args.description: ID of the CommitmentToken being redeemed. The token's price_ceiling must be >= principal. Token transitions to CommitmentRedeemed after this message.
